name: socialisn2-oauth-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker — OAuth 2.1 gateway that lets claude.ai connect to the socialisn2 MCP. Implements the MCP Authorization spec (DCR + PKCE S256 + RFC 9728 protected-resource-metadata) via @cloudflare/workers-oauth-provider, gates consent behind a single GitHub user, and proxies authenticated /mcp requests to the VPS MCP with the static bearer injected server-side.
